# @021.is/spine-email — LLM usage

> Resend wrapper: bearer auth, retry on 5xx, terminal on 4xx, idempotency-key passthrough, structured logging hook.

Install: bun add @021.is/spine-email

## Imports
- `import { makeEmailClient } from "@021.is/spine-email"` — single entry

## API
- `makeEmailClient(config)` — returns an `EmailClient` (`send(input) => Promise<{ id }>`)
- `EmailClientConfig` — `{ apiKey; defaultFrom; retries?` (default 2)`; fetchImpl?; logger? }`
- `SendEmailInput` — `{ to: string | string[]; subject; html?; text?; from?; replyTo?; cc?; bcc?; tags?; idempotencyKey? }` (requires `html` or `text`)
- Types: `EmailClient`, `SendEmailResult`

## Example
```ts
import { makeEmailClient } from "@021.is/spine-email";

const email = makeEmailClient({
  apiKey: env.RESEND_API_KEY,
  defaultFrom: "My App <noreply@example.com>",
});

await email.send({
  to: "you@example.com",
  subject: "Welcome",
  html: "<p>Welcome.</p>",
  idempotencyKey: `signup-${userId}`,
});
```

## Notes
- Dep: `@021.is/spine-errors` (throws `SomethingWentWrongException` on 4xx / missing body / exhausted retries). Server-only.
- 5xx retried up to `retries`; 4xx fails immediately (no loop on permanent errors). Templates live in the consuming app.
